subject: Integrate cds actor service provider
commit_message:
Integrate cds actor service provider

* Add request enrichment with aai service instance id and vnf id
* Implement cds grpc request
* Implement VfwControlLoopCdsTest

Issue-ID: POLICY-2088
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ib44d447d6a3a70ff800a5760032b676fdfa32d9c

Patch Set 8:

Hi Bruno! Can you apply this patch so that the actor-cds jar is packaged into the drools-applications docker image? All the actors seem to be packaged using the maven module feature-controlloop-management

>
$ git diff
diff --git a/controlloop/common/feature-controlloop-management/pom.xml b/controlloop/common/feature-controlloop-management/pom.xml
index bf43f20d..0f9de31d 100644
--- a/controlloop/common/feature-controlloop-management/pom.xml
+++ b/controlloop/common/feature-controlloop-management/pom.xml
@@ -244,6 +244,17 @@
                 </exclusion>
             </exclusions>
         </dependency>
+        <dependency>
+            <groupId>org.onap.policy.models.policy-models-interactions.model-actors</groupId>
+            <artifactId>actor.cds</artifactId>
+            <version>${policy.models.version}</version>
+            <exclusions>
+                <exclusion>
+                    <artifactId>guava</artifactId>
+                    <groupId>com.google.guava</groupId>
+                </exclusion>
+            </exclusions>
+        </dependency>
         <dependency>
             <groupId>org.onap.policy.models.policy-models-interactions</groupId>
             <artifactId>model-yaml</artifactId>

Patch Set 17:

JUnit test error investigations: 

For VcpeControlLoopTest.aaiGetFailTest() there are 2 rules that are run when the tests starts on local but does not seem to be triggered on Jenkins build :
* CL_vCPE.EVENT.MANAGER
* CL_vCPE.EVENT.MANAGER.CLEANUP

Here are logs from local, I don't see on Jenkins :

2019-10-16 10:21:06,517 DMaaPSim [main] INFO o.o.p.d.core.lock.SimpleLockManager - unlock resource 63b31229-9a3a-444f-9159-04ce2dca3be9 owner VNF:1cba1a98-91ae-45cc-8dfd-eff6921f02c4 = true
2019-10-16 10:21:06,517 DMaaPSim [main] INFO org.onap.policy.controlloop - ControlLoop-vCPE-48f0c2c3-a172-4192-9ae3-052274181b6e: CL_vCPE.EVENT.MANAGER: retracting onset, manager, and timer
2019-10-16 10:21:06,518 DMaaPSim [main] INFO org.onap.policy.controlloop - ControlLoop-vCPE-48f0c2c3-a172-4192-9ae3-052274181b6e: CL_vCPE.EVENT.MANAGER.CLEANUP

Patch Set 21:

One last thing, I would like to set the custom query flag for all unit tests in drools-applications/controlloop/templates/template.demo/src/test/java/org/onap/policy/template/demo.

From my understanding only VdnsControlLoopCqTest and VfwControlLoopCdsTest should have the custom query flag set to true, other should be false. Are you ok with this ?

Patch Set 21:

> Patch Set 21:
> 
> One last thing, I would like to set the custom query flag for all unit tests in drools-applications/controlloop/templates/template.demo/src/test/java/org/onap/policy/template/demo.
> 
> From my understanding only VdnsControlLoopCqTest and VfwControlLoopCdsTest should have the custom query flag set to true, other should be false. Are you ok with this ?

ALL of the use cases should be using Custom Query. we are removing the named query as that is being deprecated from A&AI. So upgrade now as Pramod will be removing the named query code.
